message:
feat(storage): tick 170 saved-search + pane-bookmark clusters route through send_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-first post-storage tick. Continues the progressive migration
started in tick 169 — 6 more `_with_cx` storage write methods
inlined to route their mpsc send through
`WriteCommandSender::send_with_cx(cx, ...)` instead of delegating
to legacy fns with orphan `cx::for_request()`.

Migrated (6 methods):
- Saved-search cluster (tick 137):
  * insert_saved_search_with_cx
  * update_saved_search_run_with_cx
  * update_saved_search_schedule_with_cx
  * delete_saved_search_with_cx
- Pane-bookmark cluster (tick 138):
  * insert_pane_bookmark_with_cx
  * delete_pane_bookmark_with_cx

Pattern continues tick 169's strangler-fig: each cx-first sibling
now inlines the WriteCommand construction + send_with_cx call
directly. Legacy fns preserved for ambient-cx callers.

Running tally of cx-first write methods routing through
`send_with_cx`:
- Tick 169: 6 (event-annotation cluster)
- Tick 170: 6 (this tick)
- Total: 12 / ~60+

Verified via fork bypass: 496/496 storage:: tests pass, including
`storage_tick136_event_annotation_cluster_roundtrip` (tick 169
cluster) and `storage_tick137_saved_search_cluster_roundtrip`
(this tick) byte-parity gates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
